rules.name: Schema change without test
rules.message: You edited types.ts but didn't update any test file. Write a failing test first.

rules.name: Renderer change without test
rules.message: You edited render.ts but didn't update render.test.ts. Write a failing test first.

rules.name: Type change without renderer update
rules.message: You changed types.ts but didn't update render.ts. Are the types still in sync?

rules.name: Renderer change without type definition
rules.message: You changed render.ts but didn't update types.ts. Should the types change too?

rules.name: Storage change without test
rules.message: You edited storage.ts but didn't update storage.test.ts. Write a failing test first.

rules.name: Source before test
rules.message: You edited source code before writing a test. Write a failing test first.

rules.name: Activity change without activity test
rules.message: You edited activity.ts but didn't update activity.test.ts.

rules.name: Webview change without e2e test
rules.message: You edited webview.ts but didn't update any e2e test.

rules.name: Rule file change without rule test
rules.message: You changed a rule file but didn't update rules.test.ts.
